case_title: LARRY HAHKA et al VS. DAVITA STRONG

docket_entries.description: AMENDED APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAHKA, LARRY HAHKA, LORA AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, DAVITA

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAHKA, LARRY HAHKA, LORA AS TO DEFENDANT STRONG, DAVITA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAHKA, LARRY HAHKA, LORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRONG, DAVITA $7,570.00 PRINCIPAL, $964.26 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,759.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
